first_run.rationale: The scores are identical, and the textual differences between the two evaluations are minor rephrasings and re-orderings of the same core points. Both versions consistently highlight a lack of executive leadership, team scaling, and specific regulated AI experience. The changes in wording do not introduce any new concepts or concerns and cannot be reasonably attributed to the candidate's location change from Berlin to Bucharest. The differences fall well within the range of ordinary run-to-run noise.
